title: Chasing a GitHub 429 across my Emacs CI
description: A tiny HTTP 429 on api.github.com quietly broke Emacs CI across most of my projects. Chasing it down revealed a community-wide trap with nix-based setup-emacs, led to a small throttle-proof GitHub Action, a fleet-wide CI cleanup, and a couple of long-standing bugs fixed in my ELPA mirror.
